samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Design a pulse detection unit. The input signal data_in is a continuous signal, triggered by clk. When the signal data_in changes from 0 to 1 to 0 (3 cycles), it is considered a pulse. The output signal data_out indicates the end of the pulse, and is 1 for one cycle, and then 0 until the next pulse.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="data_in">1-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="s0">Initial state.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s1">Detecting a pulse.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s2">Detecting a pulse.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s3">End of pulse detection.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic">State register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <case>
            <case_condition>State register</case_condition>
            <case_value>~rst_n</case_value>
            <case_behavior>Reset the state register to initial state and output data_out = 0.</case_behavior>
            <case_value>s0</case_value>
            <case_behavior>Reset the state register to initial state and output data_out = 0.</case_behavior>
            <case_value>s1</case_value>
            <case_behavior>Reset the state register to initial state and output data_out = 0.</case_behavior>
            <case_value>s2</case_value>
            <case_behavior>Reset the state register to initial state and output data_out = 0.</case_behavior>
            <case_value>s3</case_value>
            <case_behavior>Reset the state register to initial state and output data_out = 0.</case_behavior>
            <case_default>Reset the state register to initial state and output data_out = 0.</case_default>
        </case>
    </implementation>
</module>
